what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon showing a person silhouette alongside a clock face with hands.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with a 0 0 24 24 viewBox and explicit 24 width and height.
Sets fill to none and uses currentColor for stroke so the icon inherits text color.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round caps and joins.
Draws the person head and shoulder arc in one path.
Draws the clock as a circle with a separate path for the hands.
standouts: Combines a user/person motif with a time or schedule motif.
conventions: Follows common outline-icon conventions: no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded stroke caps and joins.
Keeps geometry directly in SVG primitives without classes, IDs, or external references.
Stores the icon as a compact single-line SVG.
notes: A reusable outline icon asset for representing a person-related time, schedule, or attendance concept.
questions: Should the icon include accessibility metadata such as a title or aria-hidden usage at the call site?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a person-clock icon, and the SVG content depicts a person silhouette with a clock.
intention_signals: It appears intended to serve as a small themeable UI icon for a person-associated time or scheduling state.
contribution: Provides a reusable, color-inheriting outline SVG asset that expresses a combined person and time concept for a fused design system.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon of a person silhouette paired with a clock face and hands.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing person-related time, scheduling, attendance, or status in an icon set.
